title: paspalum thunbergii
intro: Paspalum thunbergii, also known as Japanese or Chinese dwarf paspalum, is a type of perennial grass native to East Asia, particularly in China and Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in the treatment of wounds, fever, and other infections. The plant is also known for its health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels and improving digestion, due to its high fiber content. In herbal preparations, Paspalum thunbergii is typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
